summary: Tested drag & drop file upload feature in Dokumente tab of Mitarbeiter page. All 5 document sections (mitarbeiter, arbeitgeber, entsendung, entgelt, bea) have working dropzones, category dropdowns, and upload buttons. Fixed backend bug where upload_file function was missing - changed to use put_object from storage module.
seed_data_creation: Uploaded test file 'test_upload_document.txt' to Thorsten Graupner's documents
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dokumente tab drag & drop upload feature fully tested and working. Fixed backend bug in /app/backend/routes/mitarbeiter.py line 255 - changed 'from utils.storage import upload_file' to 'from utils.storage import put_object' and updated the function call accordingly.

dokumente_tab.navigation: PASS - Login -> Mitarbeiter -> Thorsten Graupner -> Dokumente tab

section_mitarbeiter.category_dropdown: PASS - 6 options (Lohnabrechnung, Arbeitsvertrag, Nachtrag, Zeugnis, Bescheinigung, Sonstiges)

dokumente_tab.file_upload: PASS - File uploaded successfully and appears in document list with filename, category, and date

bug_fixed.fix: Changed import from 'upload_file' to 'put_object' and updated function call to use put_object() which returns a dict with 'url' key
